description: Evaluation suite for canvas-site skills and agents
notes: Fixtures ending in .fixture are intentionally broken HTML stored under a non-.html
extension to avoid triggering the enforce-alt.py PreToolUse hook. The runner
copies them to .html at test time using Node fs directly (no hook fires).
Pattern strings starting and ending with '/' are treated as regex by the runner.

test_cases.description: Valid name — creates a well-formed page with nav, footer, and meta

output_checks.label: output confirms file was created

file_checks.label: nav copied verbatim from index.html (site-nav + nav-logo classes)
footer copied verbatim from index.html (site-footer class)
page title or h1 references the page name

test_cases.scoring_notes: 10 checks total. Pass if ≥9 pass (one grace for minor variation).

test_cases.description: Empty name — no malformed file created, no unhandled crash

output_checks.label: no JavaScript-style crash in output

test_cases.scoring_notes: Skill must not create a malformed filename when given no argument.

test_cases.description: Duplicate name — CLAUDE.md rule: never overwrite without asking

setup.content: <!-- SENTINEL: original content — must not be silently overwritten -->

output_checks.label: output acknowledges the file already exists

file_checks.label: sentinel content preserved — original not silently overwritten

test_cases.scoring_notes: CLAUDE.md rule: never delete files without asking. At least one of the two checks must pass — either a warning in output OR the file intact. Silently overwriting with no warning is a failure.

test_cases.description: Real site is clean — check-site reports zero failures
test_cases.prompt: Run /check-site. Scan all *.html files in the project root right now and output a complete site check report.

output_checks.label: summary reports 0 failed pages
no FAIL verdicts in the report
at least one PASS verdict present

test_cases.scoring_notes: Uses the real site pages rather than a fixture — verifies the skill correctly identifies clean pages as passing. Requires the live site to have no issues (run /check-site manually if this unexpectedly fails).

test_cases.description: Issues fixture page — check-site should report FAIL with specific problems

output_checks.label: eval-check-issues.html line shows FAIL
output names at least one of the known issues (alt / description / heading)

test_cases.scoring_notes: Page is missing meta description, has img without alt, and skips h1→h3.

test_cases.description: Agent detects missing alt text and flags it Critical
test_cases.prompt: Run the accessibility-agent on eval/fixtures/pages/issues-page.fixture (treat it as HTML) and report all issues. Do not write a report file — just output the findings.

output_checks.label: missing alt flagged under Critical
report references the filename or the img element

test_cases.scoring_notes: img with no alt must appear under ## Critical per WCAG 2.1 AA.

test_cases.description: Agent detects form inputs with no associated labels
test_cases.prompt: Run the accessibility-agent on eval/fixtures/pages/form-no-labels.fixture (treat it as HTML) and report all issues. Do not write a report file — just output the findings.

output_checks.label: missing labels flagged under Critical
report references the filename or input elements

test_cases.scoring_notes: Three unlabeled inputs in form-no-labels.fixture — all must be flagged Critical.

test_cases.description: Agent reports no Critical issues for a fully valid page
test_cases.prompt: Run the accessibility-agent on eval/fixtures/pages/clean-page.html and report all issues. Do not write a report file — just output the findings.

output_checks.label: Critical section explicitly states no issues found
no alt or label errors reported for clean page

test_cases.scoring_notes: clean-page.html has all alt attributes and all inputs labeled — Critical must be empty.

test_cases.description: Agent detects hardcoded values, fixed widths, and missing focus states
test_cases.prompt: Run the design-agent on eval/fixtures/css/inconsistent.css and report all issues. Do not write a report file — just output the findings.

output_checks.label: hardcoded color values detected and flagged
missing focus state detected
fixed pixel width on .hero detected

test_cases.scoring_notes: 3 checks, pass if ≥2. File has 7 distinct violations — agent should catch at least color + focus.

test_cases.description: Agent reports no hardcoded values or missing states for clean CSS
test_cases.prompt: Run the design-agent on eval/fixtures/css/clean.css and report all issues. Do not write a report file — just output the findings.

output_checks.label: no hardcoded color warnings (all values in :root)
no missing focus state warnings (:focus-visible present)
output signals CSS is in good shape

test_cases.scoring_notes: 3 checks, pass if ≥2. Clean CSS uses only tokens and has :hover/:focus-visible everywhere.
